topic: EgoHand: ego-centric hand pose estimation and gesture recognition with head-mounted millimeter-wave radar and IMUs
goal: Reproduce and extend the mmVR/EgoHand two-stage pipeline: stage-1 hand keypoint estimation from millimeter-wave radar plus IMU signals, followed by stage-2 gesture classification from predicted keypoints.

stageStatus.stage2: local classification baseline recorded; reproduction and comparison remain active

successThreshold: A command-line-only workflow that can reproduce tracked stage-1 and stage-2 experiments, document environment assumptions, and provide a clear path toward matching or exceeding the README-reported 90.8% gesture accuracy.

environment.python: Python 3.10 environment recommended by environment_py310.yaml and scripts/setup_mmvr_py310.sh
environment.frontend: Not initialized. This server is CLI-only.
